mapper.sql: select category_id, parent_id, name, icon_url, sort_order, is_active, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from bh_category
mapper.select: order by parent_id asc, sort_order asc, category_id asc
mapper.update: update bh_product set status = 'off_shelf', update_time = now() where category_id = #{categoryId} and status = 'on_shelf' and del_flag = '0'
